name: stale
description: PR has had no activity for 7+ days

name: wip
description: Work in progress — do not auto-process

name: needs-judge
description: Routed to judge loop for review

name: judge-blocked
description: Judge has requested changes twice without a title update

name: drift
description: SSoT or external compatibility drift detected

name: cron-degraded
description: Publish cron has failed twice in a row

name: cron-paused
description: Publish cron auto-paused after 3 consecutive failures

name: release-blocked
description: Release-please PR has red CI — no new release possible
